tweets.full_text:
What we know about $POLY?

1. The $POLY ticker first appeared in the CEO post on Oct 8, 2025

2. CMO Matthew Modabber went on live show and said:

“There will be a token, there will be an airdrop”

3. Investors like @1confirmation said "We’ve noted that coinbase
went IPO and BNB went Token, "Polymarket is different."

Wich means could mean Polymarket can have a token and Stock

4. Team confirm that want to launch it's own L2 to stop using Polygon chain, (similar what HYPE did)

5. Last week trademark filings for $POLY and the POLY brand surfaced

6. Week ago Polymarket team confirmed the $POLY snapshot hasn’t been taken yet

7. According to lead dev @mustafap0ly, the #1 priority right now is building a native Polymarket L2 infrastructure

Their ecosystem app made $300M+ in monthly volume, so there is a big need for chain

$POLY likely becomes the gas, the governance, for this new infra

8. Polymarket PRE-IPO stock is currently trading at $14.4B which is higher then Kalshi

There are also rumors on CT that teams plan to airdrop 31% of the supply, cumulative trading volume is your eligibility

Two interesting launches are coming 👇

@opinionlabsxyz - $OPN

• Raised $20M+
• Binance-backed prediction market (Polymarket / Kalshi)
• $10B volume in 54 days
• Airdrop based on points
• On Coinbase roadmap
• Listed on Binance Alpha + Bybit pre-market
• Polymarket expects ~ $500M FDV at TGE
• TGE: End of February

@Backpack - $BP

• Trading ~ $600M FDV on @pacifica_fi pre-market
• 29% odds for $700M+ FDV day one
• Team confirms Zero market maker deals
• Tokens only for Points holders + MadLads
• Weekly sybil redistribution (through Feb)
• TGE: Early March

Both projects from the biggest current naratives

Prediction Markets + Perps

Do you think the launch will be successful?

My thoughts on Jupiter Vote:

1 - PumpFun also promised a huge airdrop just to get people to participate in their ICO and keep using their platform

People burn fees and lose liquidity daily, and not a cent has been given back to the community

2 - There may not be a right decision (and it's okay), sometimes projects just get stuck in the middle of nowhere, and both options look bad

That's why a lot of people ask for "Option 3"

3 - I think the team is in a position where it's hard to make the community happy with the result because they will be unsatisfied anyway

4 - A lot of people think "Option 2" will pump the price, but it's not completely true

To pump the price, you need a bull market plus a use case for the token

With Option 2, you just remove selling pressure the token will stop going lower, but it will not pump because there isn't enough buying pressure

5 - Who is selling?

A lot of people say that the team is selling, but where is the on-chain proof?

To really claim that the team is selling, we need full on-chain proof: when and how much, but I don't think there is even one of them

I think $JUP is still the best choice among all Solana DeFi, and once market kick off, we can see come back, because anyway all tokens down

dyor

TGEs and airdrops are better in a bear market

It’s much less crowded, and there’s a higher chance that people won’t dump immediately but will hold/accumulate until better times - especially if token is meaningful

Projects, if you’re canceling long-awaited TGEs now, think twice

in this livestream with @meteora_my , i'm explaining how do i screening my token in this market for DLMM on @MeteoraAG 

it's a simple method but yet, very effective.

- use gmgn for the screener
- filter minimum 200k mcap
- minimum total fees paid 20 sol
- check the X community, what's the token really about, what's the narration behind the token. is it long lasting or just a hit tweet that tokenized
- check the holder, is there any suspicious holder or high frequency transfers

also a new things to check is the recently viewed on gmgn page. i also test this as an indicator how's that affecting.

more people see that token, meaning more people monitoring = more organic buy on that token.

imo, 100+ views on a tokens considered as good.

List of Airdrops possible in 2026 🪂

Backpack - very likely 🟢
Polymarket - likely 🟢
OpenSea - likely 🟢
Solstice - likely 🟢
Kalshi - possible 🟡
Abstract - possible 🟡
Hylo - possible 🟡
OnRe - possible 🟡
MetaMask - possible 🟡
Loopscale - possible 🟡
Oro - possible 🟡
Perena - possible 🟡
Claynosaurz - possible 🟡
Titan Exchange - possible 🟡
PumpFun - probably never

Which 3 are you looking forward to the most?

In Q1 alone, we already had 15+ TGEs

And 8 more are coming

There are too many tokens on the market that people don't need

With no use case and no ownership

Let's see the performance of all ICOs/TGEs by the end
If only there was a token with no time based unlocks 🤓

tweets.full_text:
There’s a new ponzi-style game launching on Solana in the middle of the bear market 🎮

I looked into how it works. Here’s the @cashcitydotfun  mechanics breakdown:

• You are a CEO managing up to 15 trading Firms

Your goal:
- hire Interns
- boost them with Advisors and Consumables
- compete against other players for a share of the daily $CASH token emissions

• Core Game Loop

1. Buy a Firm: Costs 1 SOL, gives you 8 desk slots, 1 Advisor slot, and 1 free Intern Pack

2. Open Packs: Use $CASH to buy Intern, Advisor, and Consumable packs (each has different rarity and impact)

3. Seat & Assign: Place Interns at desks to generate base Efficiency. Assign Advisor for a global multiplier. Apply Consumables to Interns for 24h boosts

4. Earn $CASH: Every 15-minute epoch, the network distributes $CASH based on your share of the total network Efficiency

5. Claim & Upgrade: Claim your $CASH, tokens can be used to buy more packs, upgrade Firms, or acquire better Advisors to grow your share

• Economy

– $CASH has no fixed supply cap
– New tokens are minted only when players claim emissions
– All in-game spending (packs, upgrades, etc.) is permanently burned

The team states there are no team, VC, or investor allocations.

Of course there is a referral system in place. If you choose to participate and need a code, mine is 'LZBD-H9JE'

Only risk what you can afford to lose, play responsibly and have fun.

How to survive the bear szn

- build your account by creating content
- use your stables to farm yield
- if you're chronically online, get a job
- apply to bounties on Superteam
- participate in a solana hackathon
- rock a panda PFP

Your RPC has to be a reliable partner through every spike and update. Call it a service provider if you want, but you are basically married.

whyNow: Time-sensitive signal: discussion shows urgency and near-term opportunity.

tweets.full_text:
Solana is winning in a ton of categories. Speed, cost, users, developers, spot trading and revenue. We need to eat into the lending and perps markets.

We're doing great, but in order to fulfill the Internet Capital Markets dream we need to be the most liquid market in the world.

Another way I would frame this:  

Equity perps are net new and better. Tokenized spot stocks, in their current form, are net new and worse.  

Equity perps are both a hedging and a short term speculation vehicle. Spot equities, on the other hand is much more about long term, intrinsic value.   

No one wants to buy a stock without cash dividends, voting rights, and legal protections (e.g. in the event of a bankruptcy). This changes as @The_DTCC, @SuperstateInc, and others come online.   

The end game is being able to use stocks--real stocks--as collateral for 24/7 markets. You only get this by disintermediating via crypto market structure, collapsing settlement from T+n into T+0 with all the benefits of a shared, global settlement layer. 

This will come alongside securities laws as the SEC pushes modern markets onchain. It's only when you have the *real* thing that the hundreds of trillions of dollars of equities value will flow into crypto.   

The future is already here, it's just not evenly distributed yet.

And we will not get there without perps and lending. This requires us to figure out how to improve the execution layer for makers, so that they choose Solana as their venue. Custom ordering rules need to come now.

You don't become the global financial layer without it.

7/ This is Vibe Trading

And it’s now programmable. Get started here:
https://t.co/LWNkdEolc0

1/ Vibe Trading is here

Introducing deBridge MCP, a universal trading API for OpenClaw, Claude, Cursor, and all your favorite AI workstations https://t.co/1QOboIXDno

NEWS: Russia’s Finance Ministry says citizens traded ~50B rubles (~$650M) in crypto daily, about $130B annually, mostly outside oversight. 

Officials are preparing a 2026 licensing framework to bring trading onto regulated platforms while domestic crypto payments remain banned. https://t.co/80c4cGWEtC

If I was a fresh grad again my first priority would be to amass a fortress of solitude portfolio and get to a point where passive returns fund my lifestyle with acceptable principal decay into death before AGI permanukes the job market in 5 years

The two ways I would do this in such a short time is either hyper-gamble in crypto/stocks or FOMO VCs into giving me money to vibe code an AI consumer-facing app and aim to get acquihired by a pre-IPO hyperscaler pronto

Would not bother wasting time applying to mckinsey et al. or the cliche wharton -> IB -> PE route. Both dead ends
Trading crypto but not AI stonks is like taking a sword to war but insisting on only using one side
